S.FORM: Borut Pahor I 1963 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Borut Pahor, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Slovenia anini i ci Borut Pahor, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Borut Pahor I 1963 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Borut Pahor, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Slovenia anini i ci Borut Pahor, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
